title: cleome bahiana
intro: Cleome bahiana, also known as the Brazilian spider flower, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Brazil. The medicinal properties of Cleome bahiana include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cleome bahiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Cleome bahiana can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments, including malaria, fever, and respiratory issues.
